title: Useful Stuff
description: Adds useful features and decoration to Minecraft.
body:
Simple Decoration is a simple decoration mod which adds symbols, drums and more to Minecraft. JEI is **_recommended_** and GeckoLib is required from version 0.2 to 0.3.1.
**This mod is currently in developement. I would appreciate the support!**
The mod will add symbols and more to Minecraft. For now there is very little, but it will be complete in late 2024/early 2025.
